series_metadata.series_title: School District Income Tax Payment Voycher for Admended Returns
series_metadata.series_description: This voucher is filed with payment by individuals who filed an amended return for their School District Income Taxes and owe an additional amount.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years from receipt, then destroy. If scanned and imaged, retain 6 months, then destroy. ; Electronic: An electronic record is maintained via the Ohio Dept Taxations FileNet for 10 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
